name: Vessel Deck Container Placement - CR2
content: Certain rectangular areas of the deck are reserved for equipment and cannot be used for container placement. Every container must be positioned entirely outside all restricted regions. All original deck-boundary, non-overlap, and class-separation constraints remain in force.
value_info: `classes`: List[int], class index (1-based) of each container.
`separation`: 2D List[int], minimum pairwise class separation matrix.
`restricted_regions`: List of rectangles `[rx, ry, rw, rl]` describing forbidden deck regions.

var1.descr: `x`: List[int] of length n_containers, bottom-left x-coordinate for each container.

var2.descr: `y`: List[int] of length n_containers, bottom-left y-coordinate for each container.

complexity.difficulty_rationale: Adds one exclusion disjunction per container-region pair while leaving boundary and pairwise separation structure otherwise unchanged.

cr_impact.notes: Variable families: x and y. Constraint groups: restricted_deck_regions.
